translation_text: The Dao is (like) the emptiness of a vessel; and in our employment of it we must be on our guard against all fulness.
translation_text_raw: The Dao is (like) the emptiness of a vessel; and in our employment of it we must be on our guard against all fulness.

translation_text: How deep and unfathomable it is, as if it were the Honoured Ancestor of all things!
translation_text_raw: How deep and unfathomable it is, as if it were the Honoured Ancestor of all things!

translation_text: We should blunt our sharp points, and unravel the complications of things;
translation_text_raw: We should blunt our sharp points, and unravel the complications of things;

translation_text: we should attemper our brightness, and bring ourselves into agreement with the obscurity of others.
translation_text_raw: we should attemper our brightness, and bring ourselves into agreement with the obscurity of others.

chinese_text: 湛兮似或存。吾不知誰之子，
translation_text: How pure and still the Dao is, as if it would ever so continue! I do not know whose son it is.
translation_text_raw: How pure and still the Dao is, as if it would ever so continue! I do not know whose son it is.

translation_text: It might appear to have been before God.
translation_text_raw: It might appear to have been before God.
